meaning: n.北美印地安人中的一种族,居住于落矶山脉以东
examples: Well, "she began hesitantly," there is Blackfoot Motorsports, but most people don't like them.
And like discovering a new treasure, that feeling accompanied us when we arrived at the Blackfoot.
And the sounds of the Big Blackfoot River and a four-count rhythm, and the hope that a fish will rise.
Paul Roos kneels on the grassy banks of a creek in the Blackfoot Valley of Montana.
For true luxury, head to the Blackfoot Valley in eastern Montana (state slogan: "The Last Best Place").
